core_philosophy: Warmth, Trust, Calm, and Community. The UI should feel like a premium, tactile journal or a peaceful retreat. Avoid clinical 'SaaS' defaults. Use generous spacing, soft shadows, and deep earthy colors.

spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous spacing. Use p-6 to p-8 inside cards.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: Rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-full for buttons and pills.
spacing_and_layout.shadows: Tactile Neumorphism. Use soft, wide ambient shadows with a 1px inner border for definition (e.g., shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-black/5).

login_page.background: Use a full-bleed warm background image with a subtle dark gradient overlay at the bottom.
login_page.card: Crystal Glassmorphism. backdrop-blur-2xl, bg-white/70 (light) or bg-black/60 (dark). 1px border-white/40.
login_page.inputs: Soft, pill-shaped inputs. bg-white/50 border-transparent focus:border-primary focus:bg-white transition-all.
login_page.spacing: Remove dead whitespace above the logo. Center the card vertically with visual weight adjustment.

bottom_navigation.layout: Floating pill design instead of full-width bottom bar. bottom-4, rounded-full mx-4 px-6.
bottom_navigation.icons: Switch to @phosphor-icons/react. Use 'Regular' weight for inactive, 'Fill' weight for active states. Scale up icon size slightly.
bottom_navigation.active_state: Replace subtle tint with a distinct indicator (e.g., a dot underneath or primary colored fill icon + bold text).

bubbles.own: Solid Primary (bg-[#4a5d3a]) with white text. rounded-2xl rounded-br-sm.
bubbles.others: Soft Sage (bg-sage-100 dark:bg-sage-900/50) with dark text. rounded-2xl rounded-bl-sm.

chat_page.moderation_icons: Hide by default. Wrap message in a 'group' and use 'opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity' for hide/delete icons to reduce visual noise.
chat_page.input_area: Attach smoothly to the bottom. Use a cohesive pill-shaped input field with an integrated send button (circular icon button).

lesson_tabs.style: Elegant sliding tabs. Avoid chunky pills.
lesson_tabs.implementation: Use Framer Motion 'layoutId' for a subtle background highlight behind active text, OR use a clean 2px sliding underline. Text should be font-medium, not button-like.

course_cards.image: Add a gradient overlay at the bottom of the image (bg-gradient-to-t from-black/60 to-transparent) to ensure smooth transition to text.
course_cards.meta_text: Apply typography.rules.meta (uppercase, wide tracking, small size) for enrolled counts and lessons.
course_cards.enroll_button: Do not stretch full width. Use a fitted 'rounded-full px-6' button or a circular floating action button (FAB) with an ArrowRight icon overlaid on the bottom right of the image.

settings_page.layout: iOS-style grouped lists. Group related settings into a single 'card-organic' container with internal rows separated by 'border-b last:border-0'.
settings_page.icons: Wrap setting icons in soft, colorful, rounded-lg backgrounds (e.g., bg-primary/10 text-primary) to create visual hierarchy.

global_inputs_and_buttons.inputs: Remove harsh borders on default state. Use a soft fill (bg-muted/50), rounding (rounded-xl), and only show primary border/ring on focus.
global_inputs_and_buttons.buttons: Must include 'active:scale-95 transition-all duration-200'. Primary buttons should have a subtle colored shadow (shadow-[0_4px_14px_0_rgba(74,93,58,0.39)]).

login_background.description: Warm morning sunlight streaming through forest trees, conveying peace and spiritual awakening. Use as full-bleed background.

course_placeholder.description: Calm nature scene for course card placeholders.

accessibility_and_testing.focus_states: Ensure all interactive elements have focus-visible ring.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement these changes across the React components. Start by updating index.css and App.css with the new color and spacing variables. Then, refactor the bottom nav to use Phosphor icons and a floating pill layout. Update the Chat page to differentiate message bubbles and hide moderation tools behind hover/group states. Fix the Course Cards by adjusting the button and meta typography. Finally, refactor the Settings page into grouped lists.
